name: Charles Haddon Spurgeon
title: Preacher & Author
bio: English Particular Baptist preacher known as the 'Prince of Preachers.' Pastor of the Metropolitan Tabernacle in London, he frequently preached to audiences of more than 10,000 people.
faith: Spurgeon was converted at age 15 and began preaching immediately. He published thousands of sermons and authored numerous books. He founded a pastors' college, orphanages, and other charitable organizations, all flowing from his deep love for Christ.

sources.title: Spurgeon's Sermons Archive
sources.note: Archive of Spurgeon's thousands of published sermons

tagline: The Prince of Preachers who drew thousands to Christ weekly
